Package com.iwedia.dtv.reminder

Class ReminderSmartInfo

java.lang.Object
com.iwedia.dtv.reminder.ReminderSmartInfo
All Implemented Interfaces:
android.os.Parcelable
public class ReminderSmartInfo extends Object implements android.os.Parcelable
This class contains information about reminder added from EPG.

    • ReminderSmartInfo

      public ReminderSmartInfo()

    • ReminderSmartInfo

      public ReminderSmartInfo(String mTitle, String mDescription, int mServiceIndex, int mRepeat, int mEventID, TimeDate mTime)
      ReminderSmartInfo Class constructor
      Parameters:
      mTitle - - Title of the record.
      mDescription - - Description of the record.
      mServiceIndex - - Service index of the record.
      mRepeat - - repeat
      mEventId - - EPG event Id.
      mTime - - Reminder time object (TimeDate).

    • ReminderSmartInfo

      public ReminderSmartInfo(String mTitle, String mDescription, int mServiceIndex, int mEventID, TimeDate mTime, TimeDate mEndTime, int mHandle, TimerRepeatMode mTimerRepeat, int mChannelNumber, boolean mIsAdultChannel, ReminderExecutionState mExecutionState, int mDuplicateState, int mId, SourceType mBroadcastType, RetransmissionType mRetransmissionType, int mNetworkId, int mTsId, int mServiceId, int mDuration, int mParentalRate, int mTracking, TimeDate mLastModifiedTime, String mRemoteReserveId, String mUserId, SourceType mTrackedBroadcastType, int mTrackedNetworkId, int mTrackedTsId, int mTrackedServiceId, int mTrackedChannelNumber, int mTrackedEventId, String mTrackedTitle, int mTrackedParentalRate, TimeDate mActualStartTime, int mActualDuration, int mFailedStatus)
      ReminderSmartInfo Class constructor
      Parameters:
      mTitle - - Title of the record.
      mDescription - - Description of the record.
      mServiceIndex - - Service index of the record.
      mEventId - - EPG event Id.
      mTime - - Reminder time object (TimeDate).
      mEndTime - - Recording end time (TimeDate).$
      mHandle - - PVR handle of recorded content.
      mTimerRepeat - - Event repeat mode (TimerRepeatMode).
      mChannelNumber - - Channel number.
      mIsAdultChannel - - Adult channel flag.
      mExecutionState - - Execution state (PvrExecutionState).
      mDuplicateState - - Duplicated state.
      mId - - ID
      mBroadcastType - - PVR record broadcast type (SourceType).
      mRetransmissionType - - PVR record retransmission type (RetransmissionType).
      mNetworkId - - PVR record network ID.
      mTsId - - PVR record of TS ID.
      mServiceId - - PVR record service ID.
      mDuration - - PVR record duration in minutes.
      mParentalRate - - PVR parental record rate.
      mTracking - - EPG event changer tracker.
      mLastModifiedTime - - PVR record of last modified time.
      mRemoteReserveId - - PVR record remote reserve ID.
      mUserId - - PVR record of user ID.
      mTrackedBroadcastType - - Tracked broadcast type (SourceType).
      mTrackedNetworkId - - Tracked network ID.
      mTrackedTsId - - Tracked TS ID.
      mTrackedServiceId - - Tracked service ID.
      mTrackedChannelNumber - - Tracked channel number.
      mTrackedEventId - - Tracked event ID.
      mTrackedTitle - - Tracked title.
      mTrackedParentalRate - - Tracked parental rate.
      mActualStartTime - - Actual start time (TimeDate).
      mActualDuration - - Actual duration in minutes.
      mFailedStatus - - Failed status if recording is failed.
